description_long: This is a large, widescreen interactive display mounted on a robust, wheeled stand. The front features a high-resolution touchscreen framed by a thick, matte black bezel, with the Microsoft logo subtly placed at the bottom center. The display is flanked by two prominent side speakers, integrated seamlessly into the bezel, giving it a professional and modern appearance. The rear of the unit is solid and angular, with a central column that houses the support structure and likely internal electronics, also bearing the Microsoft logo. The stand is wide and stable, constructed from metal with a flat base and four caster wheels for mobility. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for collaborative workspaces, conference rooms, or educational environments.
description: A large, widescreen interactive display on a sturdy, wheeled stand with a thick black bezel and integrated side speakers. The design is modern, professional, and mobile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expansive touchscreen, thick black bezel, integrated side speakers, and the Microsoft logo at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the screen, the depth of the support column, and the flat, wheeled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel, central support column with the Microsoft logo, and the wide, stable base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the screen's thinness, the depth of the support structure, and the four caster wheels.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, matte black, and rectangular with slightly rounded corners. It appears solid and uniform, with integrated side speakers and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat metal base with four caster wheels and a central vertical support column. It is robust, stable, and designed for mobility.
attribute_button_placement: Small buttons are visible on the left and right edges of the bezel, near the speakers, likely for power and volume control. They are grouped and flush with the bezel surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A Microsoft logo is visible at the bottom center of the front bezel and on the rear panel's central support column, both in a subtle, monochrome style.
